categories.name: 風格轉換
categories.description: 將照片轉換為各種藝術風格

prompts.title: 吉卜力風格
prompts.prompt_zh: 吉卜力工作室風格，宮崎駿水彩畫風，柔和的陽光，翠綠的草地，天空飄著朵朵白雲，日系動畫截圖，溫暖寧靜的氛圍，手繪動畫質感
prompts.prompt_en: Studio Ghibli style, Hayao Miyazaki art style, watercolor painted background, soft pastel colors, hand-drawn animation style, whimsical, dreamy atmosphere, lush green nature, warm sunlight filtering through trees, nostalgic feeling
prompts.tips: denoise 0.5 為最佳平衡點，保留人物結構同時風格化

prompts.title: 新海誠風格
prompts.prompt_zh: 新海誠風格，高飽和度的藍天白雲，精美的城市風景，電影感光影，細膩的光暈效果，逆光剪影，情感濃厚的氛圍，動畫電影截圖
prompts.prompt_en: Makoto Shinkai style, highly saturated blue sky with white clouds, exquisite cityscapes, cinematic lighting, delicate lens flare effects, backlit silhouette, emotionally rich atmosphere, anime film screenshot
prompts.tips: 適合城市風景和人物合照

prompts.title: 中國水墨畫
prompts.prompt_zh: 中國傳統水墨畫風格，淡雅山水意境，潑墨渲染，留白藝術，古典美學，宣紙質感，紅色印章，文人畫風
prompts.prompt_en: Chinese traditional ink wash painting style, elegant landscape mood, splashed ink rendering, negative space art, classical aesthetics, rice paper texture, red seal, literati painting style
prompts.tips: ⚠️ denoise > 0.7 人物幾乎消失，建議 0.5-0.6

prompts.title: 歐洲古典油畫
prompts.prompt_zh: 歐洲古典油畫風格，厚塗筆觸，柔和的光影過渡，美術館油畫質感，金色畫框，古典肖像畫，巴洛克光線
prompts.prompt_en: European classical oil painting style, impasto brushstrokes, soft light and shadow transitions, museum quality oil painting, golden frame, classical portrait, Baroque lighting

prompts.title: 美式漫畫
prompts.prompt_zh: 美式漫畫風格，粗黑輪廓線，高對比色彩，網點陰影，漫畫書插畫，Halftone 效果，動感線條
prompts.prompt_en: American comic book style, bold black outlines, high contrast colors, halftone shadows, comic book illustration, halftone effect, dynamic lines

prompts.title: 水彩畫
prompts.prompt_zh: 水彩畫風格，輕透的色彩疊加，自然的水痕效果，柔和的色彩過渡，白紙留白，藝術水彩插畫，濕画法
prompts.prompt_en: Watercolor painting style, translucent color layering, natural water stain effects, soft color transitions, white paper negative space, artistic watercolor illustration, wet-on-wet technique
prompts.tips: 風景照轉水彩效果最佳

prompts.title: 鉛筆素描
prompts.prompt_zh: 鉛筆素描風格，細膩的明暗漸層，手繪線條，黑白素描質感，石墨筆觸，寫實素描，紙張紋理
prompts.prompt_en: Pencil sketch style, delicate light and shadow gradients, hand-drawn lines, black and white sketch texture, graphite strokes, realistic sketch, paper texture

prompts.title: 16-bit 像素風
prompts.prompt_zh: 16-bit 像素遊戲風格，復古遊戲角色，鮮豔的像素色塊，NES 紅白機畫面，8-bit 配色，經典遊戲截圖
prompts.prompt_en: 16-bit pixel game style, retro game character, vivid pixel blocks, NES screen, 8-bit color palette, classic game screenshot, pixel art
prompts.tips: 可搭配降低解析度使用

categories.name: 寫實人像
categories.description: 高品質寫實風格的 prompt

prompts.title: 專業人像寫真
prompts.prompt_zh: 專業人像攝影，柔光棚燈，淺景深背景虛化，自然光線，高清 8K，專業攝影棚，膚色自然，眼神明亮，大光圈 f/1.8，Canon EOS R5 拍攝
prompts.prompt_en: Professional portrait photography, soft studio lighting, shallow depth of field background blur, natural light, 8K HD, professional studio, natural skin tone, bright eyes, large aperture f/1.8, shot on Canon EOS R5
prompts.tips: 人像最佳 denoise 0.5，保留臉部特徵

prompts.title: 產品攝影
prompts.prompt_zh: 商業產品攝影，純白背景，柔和的側面光線，4K 高清，無反光，專業商業攝影，簡潔構圖，商品目錄質感
prompts.prompt_en: Commercial product photography, pure white background, soft side lighting, 4K HD, no reflections, professional commercial photography, clean composition, product catalog quality

prompts.title: 風景空拍
prompts.prompt_zh: 航拍視角，無人機俯瞰，廣角鏡頭，壯麗的自然風景，黃金時段光線，專業空拍攝影，高空視野，大地色系
prompts.prompt_en: Aerial view, drone overhead perspective, wide-angle lens, majestic natural scenery, golden hour lighting, professional aerial photography, high-altitude view, earth tones

prompts.title: 美食攝影
prompts.prompt_zh: 美食攝影，自然光從側面照射，木質桌面背景，蒸汽升起，色彩鮮豔，微距鏡頭，淺景深，餐廳宣傳照質感，暖色調
prompts.prompt_en: Food photography, natural light from side, wooden table background, rising steam, vivid colors, macro lens, shallow depth of field, restaurant promotional photo quality, warm tones
prompts.tips: 暖色調讓食物更有誘惑力

prompts.title: Q 版動漫
prompts.prompt_zh: Q 版動漫風格，可愛動漫角色，鮮豔色彩，賽璐璐著色，日本動畫美術風格，大眼睛，簡化特徵，漫畫插畫，Q 版比例
prompts.prompt_en: Anime style, cute anime character, vibrant colors, cel-shaded, Japanese anime art style, large expressive eyes, simplified features, manga illustration, chibi proportions
prompts.tips: 需要高 denoise 0.85 才能出 Q 版效果

prompts.title: 遊戲角色
prompts.prompt_zh: 3D 遊戲角色設計，PBR 材質，次世代品質，詳細的面部特徵，角色概念藝術，Unreal Engine 5 渲染，電影級光照
prompts.prompt_en: 3D game character design, PBR materials, next-gen quality, detailed facial features, character concept art, Unreal Engine 5 render, cinematic lighting
prompts.tips: denoise 0.7 平衡結構與 3D 感

prompts.title: 3D 手辦風 (Pop Mart)
prompts.prompt_zh: 3D 盲盒玩具風格，Pop Mart 風格，可愛 Q 版人偶，亮面塑膠質感，粉彩色調，棚燈照明，白色背景，商品攝影
prompts.prompt_en: 3D blind box toy style, Pop Mart style, cute chibi figure, glossy plastic texture, pastel colors, studio lighting, white background, product photography, blind box toy
prompts.tips: denoise 0.85 才能完全轉換為手辦風格

prompts.title: 商標設計
prompts.prompt_zh: 現代商標設計，簡約幾何造型，扁平化設計，專業品牌視覺，單一主色調，白色背景，矢量圖形質感，科技品牌
prompts.prompt_en: Modern logo design, minimalist geometric shape, flat design, professional brand visual, single primary color, white background, vector graphic quality, tech brand
prompts.tips: 建議搭配簡化底圖使用

prompts.title: 海報素材
prompts.prompt_zh: 電影海報風格，大膽的排版設計，戲劇性光影，高對比色彩，藝術海報質感，文字留白空間，電影宣傳視覺
prompts.prompt_en: Movie poster style, bold typographic design, dramatic lighting, high contrast colors, artistic poster quality, space for text, film promotional visual

prompts.title: 社群貼圖
prompts.prompt_zh: 社群媒體貼圖，LINE 貼圖風格，可愛表情，簡潔線條，鮮豔色彩，白色背景，PNG 貼圖風格，日系可愛
prompts.prompt_en: Social media sticker, LINE sticker style, cute expressions, clean lines, vivid colors, white background, PNG sticker style, Japanese kawaii
